title: Psychiatric Day Treatment * Adolescents - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Psychiatric Day Treatment * Adolescents 5 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adolescents Children Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FAMILY SOLUTIONS SOUTHERN OREGON FAMILY SOLUTIONS ASHLAND PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program offering a range of year-round support for children with severe emotional or behavioral issues with therapy, skills training, and an on-site classroom. 1836 Fremont Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 5-12 who are experiencing serious, long-term emotional and/or behavioral problems and have a recent mental health assessment documenting the presence of a treatable mental health diagnosis. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm. Youth attend the program Monday-Friday 8am-2:15pm.
